expectations.text: The answer separates high-confidence updates from ambiguous unresolved items.
expectations.evidence: It has separate Update and Leave Alone sections.

expectations.text: The answer marks payroll and remote-working allowance as income/paycheck with high confidence.
expectations.evidence: Lines 9-10 categorize payroll and remote-working allowance as income/reimbursement.

expectations.text: The answer treats clear Revolut or self-transfer movements as transfer candidates with transfer-flag caution.
expectations.evidence: Lines 18 and 20 say likely transfer/self-transfer but leave them alone rather than presenting a cautious transfer-pair update.

expectations.text: The answer leaves opaque POS and cash withdrawal items unresolved instead of guessing.
expectations.evidence: Lines 12, 19, and 26-28 avoid guessing for opaque/cash items.
